title: Klinglnberg india pvt ltd ransomware incident

extortion.description: [AI generated] Klingelnberg India Pvt Ltd is a subsidiary of the global engineering company Klingelnberg Group. Located in India, the company specializes in the development and manufacture of precision technology, providing different industries with gear technology, gear tools, and automation systems. It is recognized for its innovation and quality in products and services, supporting sectors like aerospace, automotive, and energy.
